title: Huta's Compact GUI
description: This vanilla-style resource pack streamlines HUD and UI elements for a cleaner look, including a Dark Mode GUI.
body:
This resource pack aims to minimize visual clutter, preserving the clean and simple look of vanilla Minecraft.

![Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88d765f28233ed52ab754de18ba5fb1c2c40f25.png)

Looking for a specific icon style or color scheme? Check out the "Versions" section for different variations of this resource pack. 

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4993cd511083630350ed5cc229dbc46b3d17ac0.png)

Pick the option that feels best for you!

![Different icon and color options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf9df6ee5d6f3322b90f4690c58a427d5514d6a0.png)

While this resource pack supports some mods, please note that not all may be fully compatible with the latest versions. I hope you won't encounter any major issues.
